summary: Iteration 15 - Manager Dashboard (Phase 2) Testing Complete. All 20 backend tests passed (100%). All 8 Manager Dashboard tabs tested and working. P0 fix verified - teste@teste.com is protected from deletion (403 returned).

minor.issue: Tiers are not preserved when saving loyalty config. POST only saves enabled/points_per_dollar/daily_limit/anti_fraud_max but not tiers. New configs lose default tiers.

issues: Tiers section shows 'Tiers' header but no tier cards display when config has been saved (due to backend not preserving tiers)

action_items: OPTIONAL: Update POST /api/manager/loyalty to preserve existing tiers OR add tiers parameter to allow tier customization
seed_data_creation: Test shift 'TEST Evening Shift' created during testing, visible in Shifts & Ops
context_for_next_testing_agent: Manager Dashboard fully tested. All 8 sections (Overview, Staff & Roles, Menu/Products, Shifts & Ops, NFC & Guests, Reports & Finance, Loyalty & Rewards, Settings) are functional. P0 user deletion protection is working - teste@teste.com returns 403 on delete.

features_tested.P0_ensure_system_account: ✅ server.py ensure_system_account() verifies/recreates teste@teste.com on startup
features_tested.manager_overview: ✅ GET /api/manager/overview returns KPIs (revenue_today/week/month, avg_ticket, unique_guests, open_tabs), charts (revenue_by_hour, top_items, guest_funnel), alerts
features_tested.manager_staff: ✅ GET /api/manager/staff returns staff (system users), barmen (operational), schedules
features_tested.manager_staff_add: ✅ POST /api/manager/staff adds new operational staff member
features_tested.manager_schedule: ✅ POST /api/manager/schedule saves schedule entry for staff
features_tested.manager_guests: ✅ GET /api/manager/guests returns guest list with search capability
features_tested.manager_guest_detail: ✅ GET /api/manager/guests/{id} returns guest profile with entries and sessions
features_tested.manager_reports_sales: ✅ GET /api/manager/reports/sales returns by_item, by_hour, by_method, exceptions
features_tested.manager_loyalty_get: ✅ GET /api/manager/loyalty returns config with default tiers
features_tested.manager_loyalty_save: ✅ POST /api/manager/loyalty saves config (note: tiers not preserved)
features_tested.manager_shifts_close: ✅ POST /api/manager/shifts/close creates shift record with cash reconciliation
features_tested.frontend_8_tabs: ✅ Manager page loads with 8 sidebar tabs (Overview, Staff & Roles, Menu/Products, Shifts & Ops, NFC & Guests, Reports & Finance, Loyalty & Rewards, Settings)
features_tested.frontend_overview: ✅ Overview tab shows KPI cards, Revenue by Hour chart, Top 10 Items, Guest Funnel
features_tested.frontend_staff: ✅ Staff tab shows system users (teste@teste.com Protected) and operational staff with add/edit/delete
features_tested.frontend_menu: ✅ Menu tab shows catalog with category filters (All, Beers, Cocktails, Mains, Non-alcoholic, Snacks, Spirits, Starters), search, add/edit/delete
features_tested.frontend_shifts: ✅ Shifts tab shows close shift form and shift history with audit trail
features_tested.frontend_guests: ✅ NFC & Guests tab shows guest list (3 guests: John Smith VIP, Kevin Brown Blocked, Maria Lopez) with search
features_tested.frontend_reports: ✅ Reports tab shows sales data with period selector (today/week/month) and CSV export button
features_tested.frontend_loyalty: ✅ Loyalty tab shows config with enable/disable, points settings (tiers display empty after save)
features_tested.frontend_settings: ✅ Settings tab shows venue settings with save functionality

api_endpoints_tested: DELETE /api/auth/users/{id} - Returns 403 for protected user, 404 for non-existent
POST /api/manager/shifts/close - Closes shift with cash reconciliation
GET /api/manager/guests - Returns guest list with search
